primary_accounting_issue: Qualification et classification IFRS 9 d’un actif financier au regard du critère des flux de trésorerie contractuels constitués exclusivement de principal et d’intérêts

authority_resolution.selection_reason: Only IFRS 9 is provided as a governing standard on the classification of financial assets, and under the stated precedence rule an IFRS standard governs this issue directly.
authority_resolution.residual_uncertainty: Low uncertainty because the context contains only IFRS 9 and it directly addresses both the SPPI assessment and the resulting measurement categories.

primary_authority.reason: These paragraphs directly govern classification of financial assets by reference to business model and whether contractual cash flows are solely payments of principal and interest.

supporting_authority.reason: These paragraphs clarify what constitutes SPPI and a basic lending arrangement.
These paragraphs constrain the SPPI analysis where contractual terms can change timing or amount of cash flows, including prepayment and extension features.
These examples illustrate instruments that do and do not meet the SPPI condition.
These paragraphs clarify when apparent principal-and-interest cash flows fail SPPI, including non-recourse and de minimis features.
These paragraphs provide additional constraints for contractually linked instruments and confirm when fair value through profit or loss remains a distinct classification outcome.
This paragraph adds the distinct fair value through profit or loss designation option where it eliminates or significantly reduces an accounting mismatch.

peripheral_authority.reason: These agenda decisions address narrower fact patterns that are not needed to identify the peer top-level classification approaches for this issue.

treatment_families.family: Financial assets meeting the solely payments of principal and interest condition within a hold-to-collect business model
Financial assets meeting the solely payments of principal and interest condition within a collect-and-sell business model
Residual or designated classification for financial assets not measured under the two SPPI-based business model categories

approaches.label: Amortised cost
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies amortised cost as a top-level measurement category for financial assets with SPPI cash flows in a hold-to-collect business model.

approaches.label: Fair value through other comprehensive income
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies fair value through other comprehensive income as a top-level measurement category for financial assets with SPPI cash flows in a collect-and-sell business model.

approaches.label: Fair value through profit or loss
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies fair value through profit or loss as the residual measurement category and also as an available designation option in specified circumstances.
